title: Sensing More
subtitle: Awareness and movement grow
description: By week 18, your baby’s senses are developing further, and movements become more noticeable. You may start feeling more consistent kicks and movements as your baby becomes more active.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements become more noticeable and regular
You may start feeling stronger kicks and movements
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and continue regular routines
Practice gentle exercises and maintain good posture

medical_checkups.note: This stage often includes important detailed scans.

commonly_suggested.name: Anomaly Scan (Level 2 Ultrasound)
commonly_suggested.purpose: Checks detailed fetal anatomy and development

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal progress

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will schedule the anomaly scan around this period to assess development in detail.

important_note: The anomaly scan is an important milestone to evaluate your baby’s development.
reassurance: Feeling your baby’s movements can be a reassuring and exciting experience.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s recommendations for scans and evaluations.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports healthy growth and development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored closely during detailed scans.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply during increased growth and activity.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this stage of development.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing development and metabolic function.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As development becomes more detailed, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy progress.
